REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT MARTIN YUDOWITZ, CAROL GRAHAM MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 4, 2019 ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. IF PARTIES AGREE ON A DIFFERENT DATE FOR A HEARING (AFTER SEPTEMBER 4, 2019), PARTIES MAY JOINTLY NOTIFY THE COURT TO AVOID AN APPEARANCE SOLELY FOR THE PURPOSE OF CONTESTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE NOTIFICATION MAY BE PROVIDED TO DEPARTMENT 501 AT DEPARTMENT501CONTESTTR@SFTC.ORG NO LATER THAN 8:00 A.M. ON AUGUST 8, 2019. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)
